content:
# Inference Crash Pattern During corvia-dev Restart (2026-03-28)

## Pattern
When corvia-dev restarts rapidly (e.g., during spoke testing), the inference process:
1. Loads embedding model (nomic-embed-text-v1.5) successfully
2. Loads chat model (qwen3 via llama.cpp) successfully
3. Crashes with exit code 1 approximately 4 seconds after chat model loads
4. Manager restarts inference, but restarted process only starts gRPC server without reloading models
5. All subsequent embedding requests fail with Model not loaded

## Resolution
Clean restart after a settling period (3+ seconds between down and up) avoids the crash. The race condition appears related to rapid stop/start cycles where model memory is not fully released before the new process claims GPU resources.

## Impact on Multi-Spoke
Spoke testing requires server restarts (e.g., changing bind address). Must use clean restart pattern from CLAUDE.md: corvia-dev down, sleep 3, corvia-dev up.
